name: ballad
description: Deterministic Lua project exporter and bundler for Moonstone

interface.shortDescription: Export Moonstone Lua projects to portable runtime layouts
interface.longDescription: Ballad reads a synchronized Moonstone project, collects project Lua files and selected Lua package modules, and emits a deterministic output tree plus file-graph.json. Supports lua and love layouts.
defaultPrompt: Export this Moonstone project to a portable Lua layout.
Bundle this project for LÖVE2D distribution.
